name: biomind
description: Biomedical research assistant — searches arXiv papers using BM25 and answers questions with Groq LLM.

tools.name: search_papers
tools.description: Search arXiv for biomedical research papers. Returns titles, authors, abstracts and PDF links.

tools.name: ask_biomind
tools.description: Answer biomedical questions using BM25 retrieval over arXiv papers and Groq LLM.

tools.name: get_status
tools.description: Get current BM25 index size and paper cache count.
